name: Prince Christian ♡︎ Twisted Disney
description:
Snow White's son invites you to a party.

Christian can't understand why, against his better judgment, his eyes keep searching for you in the crowd. Damn it, Frederick would twist his head off if he knew what thoughts were running through it. You're different, but not in the best way, but that's what attracts Christian. All he have to do is decide if the infatuation is worth risking the trust of a friend.

ОH. MY. GOD. You guys are crazy. I have no words to describe how excited I was to see the 500 follower count. In fact, when my boyfriend told me about it, I didn't even know how to react. It's very cool, I'm very happy and very grateful to everyone who supports me and leaves feedback. You are my main motivation to get my ass up and make bots. I just want to say THANK YOU. Really, thank you!!! It makes me insanely happy to read every single review, to see your engagement, to know that you're interested in what I'm doing. Kisses on everyone's forehead.

I don't think Christian is a special gift for 500 followers. It's just that this guy caught your attention for some reason, so here he is. Seriously, I didn't even plan on Christian being a different bot from the beginning.

English is not my first language, so I often use a translator. Please help me out and point out any mistakes in this bot so that I can do it better!
creator: hayespeachjm
